Generated Narrative: ConceptMap FRImagingRadiationExposureAuthorizationLMCDAFHIR

This mapping does not specify any particular context of use.


Group 1 Mapping from https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-lm-autorisation-exposition to https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-dicom-exposition-patient

Source CodeRelationshipTarget Code
FRLMAutorisationExpositionis equivalent toFRCDADICOMExpositionPatient
FRLMAutorisationExposition.codeis equivalent toFRCDADICOMExpositionPatient.code
FRLMAutorisationExposition.participantis equivalent toFRCDADICOMExpositionPatient.participant

Group 2 Mapping from https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-dicom-exposition-patient to https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-observation-radiation-exposure-document

Source CodeRelationshipTarget Code
FRCDADICOMExpositionPatientis equivalent toFRObservationRadiationExposureDocument.performer:professionnelAutorisantExposition
FRCDADICOMExpositionPatient.code(not mapped)
FRCDADICOMExpositionPatient.participantis equivalent toFRObservationRadiationExposureDocument.performer:professionnelAutorisantExposition

title: Mapping Métier/CDA/FHIR : Professionnel autorisant l'exposition aux radiations
